title: DhilipBinny/KairoClaw
summary: Self-hosted multi-user AI gateway — Telegram, WhatsApp, web chat. Multi-provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama), 20+ tools, smart memory, model routing, admin dashboard, cron scheduling.

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: SysAdminDoc/FileOrganizer
summary: Hybrid file organizer for Windows: C#/.NET 8/WinUI 3 shell + Python core. Multi-provider AI classification (DeepSeek, GitHub Models, Ollama), six cleanup scanners, progressive hash + perceptual dedup, EXIF photo workflows.

title: asqwqwqwqwqwqw/ai-in-the-terminal
summary: 🚀 Master AI tools in the terminal, streamline workflows, and enhance productivity beyond browser limitations with this complete guide.

title: gumieri/nenya
summary: A lightweight, highly secure AI API Gateway/Proxy written in Go. Acts as transparent middleware between local AI coding clients (OpenCode/Aider/Cursor) and upstream LLM providers (Gemini, DeepSeek, Zhipu z.ai).

title: ZSeven-W/agent-rs
summary: Pure-Rust async runtime for LLM agents. Multi-provider (Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama), tool-capable end-to-end, structured permissions, real MCP support, USD cost tracking, Files API, optional FS+search tool pack.

title: lx-0/llm-wiki
summary: Self-cartography engine: AI memories + sessions + scans + clippings → LLM-compiled Obsidian wiki you and your agents read from daily.

title: JapanNomu/tools-ja
summary: Hub repo for Claude Code related tools (Japanese distributions)

title: JapanNomu/tools
summary: Hub repo for Claude Code related tools

title: Oceanicabysslesothomonetaryunit652/llm-file-manager-agent
summary: 📁 Manage your files effortlessly using natural language with this LLM-powered assistant, combining intelligence and intuitive design for seamless navigation.

title: pepito-911/research
summary: 🔍 Explore AI-generated research projects, showcasing code and insights created entirely by LLM tools like Claude Code.

title: Chimdiiii/OpenMemory
summary: 🧠 Enhance AI with OpenMemory for long-term memory storage, recall, and explanation, using a unique cognitive architecture.

title: hesamaria/rag-chatbot
summary: 🧠 Build a RAG-driven chatbot to answer user questions using real-world knowledge from documents, focused on mental health and social policy in Indonesia.

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: Lightweight multi-tenant agentic runtime in one Go sidecar. Owns the LLM tool-use loop across Anthropic, OpenAI, and   Ollama with native prompt-cache control, MCP tool dispatch, and per-tenant fairness. TypeScript and Python adapters over   HTTP+SSE. Powers JobEmber.

title: AvixoSec/sarix
summary: Code analysis CLI - code review, bugs, security, docs, refactoring. Multi-provider LLM, SARIF output, CI-ready.

title: toolpack-ai/toolpack-sdk
summary: The Toolpack SDK is a unified TypeScript SDK for building AI-powered applications. It provides a single, consistent API to work with multiple AI providers OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Ollama without vendor lock-in.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.
